# Copilot Instructions Addendum — DESIGN.md UI Governor

## FE / UI / UX DESIGN.md Rule

When a task touches frontend UI, UX, React components, Tailwind styling, design consistency, Figma Make, Google Stitch, DESIGN.md, screen packs, navigation, operator UI, or frontend implementation planning, read:

```text
docs/ai-skills/design-md-ui-governor/SKILL.md
DESIGN.md
docs/design/DESIGN.md
docs/audit/frontend-source-alignment-snapshot.md
```

If `docs/audit/frontend-source-alignment-snapshot.md` is missing and the task depends on current frontend structure, inspect the source directly or create the snapshot first.

This UI skill does not override Hard Mode MOM.

If UI work touches execution, quality, material, station, operation, tenant/scope/auth, governed actions, allowed actions, operational status, event/projection truth, or audit, also apply:

```text
docs/ai-skills/hard-mode-mom-v3/SKILL.md
```

Hard reject UI output that fakes backend truth, authorization, execution transitions, quality pass/fail, ERP posting, backflush completion, deterministic AI decisions, or Digital Twin accuracy.
